fields.name: Hair Wash & Blowout
fields.description: Professional hair wash, conditioning treatment, and blowout styling for silky smooth results.

fields.name: Hair Braiding
fields.description: Expert braiding in a variety of styles — cornrows, box braids, micro braids, and more.

fields.name: Relaxer Treatment
fields.description: Chemical relaxer treatment to straighten and smoothen natural hair, followed by deep conditioning.

fields.name: Manicure
fields.description: Classic manicure including nail shaping, cuticle care, hand massage, and nail polish of your choice.

fields.name: Pedicure
fields.description: Relaxing foot soak, exfoliation, nail shaping, cuticle treatment, foot massage, and polish.

fields.name: Gel Nails
fields.description: Long-lasting gel nail application with a wide range of colours. Includes nail shaping and art design.

fields.name: Facial Treatment
fields.description: Deep cleansing facial with steaming, exfoliation, extraction, mask, and moisturizing for glowing skin.

fields.name: Full Body Massage
fields.description: Therapeutic full-body massage to relieve tension, improve circulation, and promote deep relaxation.

fields.name: Bridal Makeup
fields.description: Complete bridal makeup including foundation, contouring, eye makeup, and setting spray for an all-day flawless look.

fields.message: Wasafi is simply the best! I got my hair done for my wedding and it was absolutely perfect. The stylists are so skilled and professional.
I love the online booking system! I can book my appointments at any time without having to call or walk in. The service is always top notch.
The facial treatment left my skin glowing for days. The staff are warm, friendly and very knowledgeable. Highly recommended!
Affordable prices, clean environment, and amazing service. Wasafi is my go-to salon every month. The braiding is always neat and long-lasting.
